{{CargoRelic
|name=Dung Beetle Specimen
|class_id=20347
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=This dung beetle specimen doesn't even have a scratch on the carapace. Its traits of a dung beetle are also perfectly preserved, making this extremely valuable for research purposes.
|fame=13
|art=16
|fth=14
|civ=16
|tech=31
|ss1=Against Dung Beetles, Troop Casualty -1%
|ss2=Against Dung Beetles, Troop Casualty -2%
|ss3=Against Dung Beetles, Troop Casualty -3%
|ss4=Against Dung Beetles, Troop Casualty -3%
|ss7=Against Dung Beetles, Troop Casualty -3%<br> (Awakened)
}}
